title: Enhanced Evil x FA
body:
> ### ℹ️ Info
**Enchanced Evil** — This is a resource pack whose main idea is to change hostile mobs for the better, as well as to add original variations [WIP]

_*The resource pack was created to work with Fresh Animations, so it is highly recommended for installation_
## 


[![emf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb6832e45d48f0e355fcab0d68ee1650ad2ab4c6.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

[![fresh animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1b125621b3e03da15f4b4edf15e8b97579ba5e3.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
